summary: AurborBloom Tenant Isolation Testing Complete - All 12 test cases PASSED. Both AurborBloom and Perfect Solutions tenants have fully isolated login/signup routes. No tenant dropdown visible on any login page. All redirects working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All tenant isolation features implemented correctly
Login.jsx properly redirects to /aurborbloom/login unless ?superadmin=true is present
TenantLogin.jsx and TenantSignup.jsx show isolated pages without tenant dropdown
Navbar links correctly point to /aurborbloom/login and /aurborbloom/signup
Hero 'Get Started Free' button correctly navigates to /aurborbloom/signup
Logout flows correctly redirect to /{tenant}/login for both tenants
Super Admin login page accessible via /login?superadmin=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tenant isolation testing complete. All login/signup routes are properly isolated per tenant. No tenant dropdown visible on any login page.

/aurborbloom/login.details: Shows isolated login page without tenant dropdown

/aurborbloom/signup.details: Shows isolated signup page without tenant dropdown

/perfectsolutions/login.details: Shows isolated login page with Perfect Solutions branding, no dropdown

/perfectsolutions/signup.details: Shows isolated signup page with Perfect Solutions branding, no dropdown

/login?superadmin=true.details: Shows Super Admin Portal login page

navbar_signup_link.details: Navbar 'Sign Up Free' button links to /aurborbloom/signup

hero_get_started.details: Hero 'Get Started Free' button navigates to /aurborbloom/signup

perfectsolutions_logout_redirect.details: Perfect Solutions admin logout redirects to /perfectsolutions/login

test_3_aurborbloom_login.expected: Isolated login page without tenant dropdown
test_3_aurborbloom_login.actual: Shows 'Welcome to AurborBloom' with Employee/Admin tabs, no dropdown

test_4_aurborbloom_signup.expected: Isolated signup page without tenant dropdown
test_4_aurborbloom_signup.actual: Shows 'Join AurborBloom' with signup form, no dropdown

test_5_perfectsolutions_login.expected: Isolated login page with Perfect Solutions branding
test_5_perfectsolutions_login.actual: Shows 'Welcome to Perfect Solutions' with logo and branding, no dropdown

test_6_perfectsolutions_signup.expected: Isolated signup page with Perfect Solutions branding
test_6_perfectsolutions_signup.actual: Shows 'Join Perfect Solutions' with signup form, no dropdown

test_7_superadmin_login.actual: Shows 'Super Admin Portal' badge and 'System Administrator' heading

test_8_navbar_links.tested: Navbar Login and Sign Up Free buttons
test_8_navbar_links.actual: Both links correctly point to tenant-specific URLs

test_11_perfectsolutions_logout.tested: Perfect Solutions admin login -> dashboard -> logout

test_12_superadmin_company_link.tested: 'Go to company login' link on Super Admin page
